title: Food Service Supervisor
desc: Supervise and coordinate food service staff. Plan food preparation and organize service flow. No experience required — training provided.

title: General Farm Worker
desc: Plant, cultivate and harvest crops. Operate farm machinery and equipment. Seasonal work available with possibility of extension.

title: Light Duty Cleaner
desc: Clean and maintain commercial buildings. Sweep, mop, dust and polish. Flexible hours available — flexible hours — great for students.

title: Construction Labourer
desc: Assist with construction projects. Load and unload materials. Operate hand tools and equipment. Will train the right candidate.

title: Retail Sales Associate
desc: Greet customers and assist with purchases. Stock shelves and maintain displays. Customer-facing role — great for language practice.

title: Truck Driver — Class 1
desc: Drive long-haul truck to transport goods. Must hold valid Class 1 license. Training provided — entry-level friendly.

title: Kitchen Helper
desc: Wash dishes, clean kitchen areas. Prepare ingredients. Assist cooks with food prep. No experience needed — on-the-job training.

title: Warehouse Worker
desc: Pick, pack and ship orders. Operate forklift (training provided). Loading and unloading trucks. Safety-first environment.

title: Personal Support Worker (PSW)
desc: Assist patients with daily living activities. Monitor health conditions. PSW certificate required. Entry-level candidates welcome.

title: Hotel Room Attendant
desc: Clean and prepare hotel rooms. Replace linens and amenities. Staff accommodation may be available. Beautiful mountain location.

title: Cashier
desc: Process customer transactions. Handle cash and debit/credit. Provide friendly customer service. Multilingual skills an asset.

title: Welder
desc: MIG/TIG welding on steel structures. Read blueprints. CWB certification an asset. Foreign trade credentials recognized.

title: Delivery Driver
desc: Deliver packages within the Greater Montreal area. Valid G license required. Knowledge of French an asset but not mandatory.

title: Assembly Line Worker
desc: Assemble automotive parts. Quality inspection. Operate machinery. Shift work available (days, afternoons, nights). No experience needed.

title: Housekeeper
desc: Clean residential homes. Laundry, vacuuming, organizing. Reliable transportation needed. Flexible scheduling.

title: Cook
desc: Prepare meals according to recipes. Maintain kitchen cleanliness. Experience in any cuisine welcome. LMIA-approved employer.

title: Early Childhood Educator
desc: Plan and implement child development programs. Supervise children age 0-6. ECE diploma required — credential assessment available for foreign-trained.

title: Landscaping Worker
desc: Maintain gardens and lawns. Plant flowers and shrubs. Operate lawn mowers and trimmers. Outdoor work — seasonal April to October.

title: Security Guard
desc: Patrol premises. Monitor security cameras. Write incident reports. Valid Ontario security guard license required — training available.

title: Receptionist
desc: Answer phones and greet visitors. Schedule appointments. Data entry and filing. Professional communication skills required — multilingual a plus.

title: Meat Cutter / Butcher
desc: Cut, trim and prepare meat for retail or wholesale. LMIA-approved. Entry-level friendly — part-time and summer hours welcome.

title: Painter — Residential
desc: Interior and exterior painting. Surface preparation, patching. Experience preferred but will train motivated entry-level candidates.

title: Food Counter Attendant
desc: Take customer orders. Prepare simple food items. Maintain cleanliness. Fast-paced environment. Great first job.

title: Dental Assistant
desc: Assist dentist during procedures. Sterilize instruments. Take dental X-rays. CDA certification required — credential recognition available.

title: Grocery Store Clerk
desc: Stock shelves. Assist customers. Maintain store cleanliness. Flexible hours — evenings and weekends. No experience necessary.

title: Machine Operator
desc: Operate CNC machines and production equipment. Follow safety protocols. Read technical drawings. Training provided for new workers.

title: Caregiver — Home Support
desc: Provide care for elderly in their homes. Meal preparation, hygiene assistance. Compassionate individuals welcome. LMIA pathway available.

title: Electrician — Journeyman
desc: Install and maintain electrical systems. Read schematics. Red Seal certification required — foreign credentials assessment process available.

title: Baker
desc: Prepare breads, pastries, and cakes. Operate commercial ovens. Early morning shifts. Baking experience from any country valued.

title: IT Support Technician
desc: Provide technical support. Troubleshoot hardware/software issues. Set up workstations. CompTIA A+ or equivalent international cert accepted.

title: General Labourer
desc: Physical labour tasks. Loading, cleaning, sorting materials. Reliable and hardworking individuals wanted. No experience required.

title: Daycare Assistant
desc: Support lead educators. Supervise children. Prepare snacks. First Aid/CPR required. Background in child care from any country welcome.

title: Plumber Apprentice
desc: Assist journeyman plumber. Install pipes, fixtures. Learn Canadian plumbing codes. Great pathway for internationally trained plumbers.

title: Restaurant Server
desc: Take orders and serve food. Provide excellent customer service. Smart Serve certification needed (can be obtained quickly). Tips on top of hourly wage.

title: Forklift Operator
desc: Operate forklift in warehouse. Load/unload trailers. Inventory management. Forklift license required — certification program available.

title: Nail Technician
desc: Provide manicure and pedicure services. Nail art and gel applications. Provincial license required. Internationally trained technicians welcome.

title: School Bus Driver
desc: Drive school bus safely. Class B license required (training provided). Criminal record check needed. Morning and afternoon shifts.

title: Accounting Clerk
desc: Process invoices and payments. Data entry into QuickBooks. Basic bookkeeping. Accounting diploma from any country accepted.

title: Produce Picker / Packer
desc: Harvest vegetables in greenhouse. Sort and pack produce. Physically demanding. Seasonal April–November. LMIA-approved position.

title: Auto Mechanic
desc: Diagnose and repair vehicles. Brake, engine, transmission work. 310S license or equivalent foreign credential. Tools provided.
